items.title: Fleet & Corporate Charging Management Release
items.description: Release of Fleet & Corporate Charging Management improvements aimed at moving Reduced Fleet TCO and Fleet Contract Value, anchored in session reliability, roaming clarity, and depot-readiness as charger density and utilization rise and led through Fleet Management. The quarter concentrates on charger reliability, roaming transparency, and fleet-depot readiness as networks scale so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase reduced fleet tco by strengthening fleet management and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Decrease charging cost control by improving fleet management and removing avoidable workflow friction.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase fleet contract value by strengthening fleet management and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Fleet Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Contract & Customer Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Driver Authorization Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Tariff & Pricing Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Web Portal.
Deployed workflow updates in Public APIs.
Deployed workflow updates in ERP Integrations.

items.title: Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform Release
items.description: Release of Enterprise Charge Point Management Platform improvements aimed at moving Profitable Charging Network and Annual Recurring Revenue from CPMS, anchored in session reliability, roaming clarity, and depot-readiness as charger density and utilization rise and led through Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway. The quarter concentrates on charger reliability, roaming transparency, and fleet-depot readiness as networks scale so the work reads like a realistic OKR-driven investment set for a company with roughly 250 product and technology people.

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase profitable charging network by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase network utilization by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase annual recurring revenue from cpms by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase account expansion by strengthening charge point connectivity & protocol gateway and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

productBricks.change: Released Charge Point Connectivity & Protocol Gateway with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Charge Point Management with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Monitoring, Alarms & Remote Operations with domain-specific workflow improvements.
Released Session Orchestration with domain-specific workflow improvements.

deliveryChannels.change: Deployed workflow updates in Web Portal.
Deployed workflow updates in Public APIs.
Deployed workflow updates in Partner Integrations.

items.title: EV Driver Experience Platform Release

customerKPIs.expectedImpact: Increase stress-free charging experience by strengthening ev driver app and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.
Increase session reliability by strengthening ev driver app and making the core workflow more reliable end to end.

businessKPIs.expectedImpact: Reduce driver lifetime value by improving ev driver app and removing avoidable workflow friction.

Released Driver Authorization Service with domain-specific workflow improvements.
